zh.lifeSummary: 當Nathaniel Batchelder於大約1630年出生在英國米德萊可哈可尼時，他的父親Nathaniel Batchiler42歲，母親Hester Mercier11628歲。他於1656年12月10日與Deborah Smith在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾洛金哈姆咸頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他在美國新罕布夏州洛金哈姆咸頓住了大約12年。他去世於1710年1月2日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾洛金哈姆咸頓享年81歲，埋葬在美國新罕布夏州洛金哈姆咸頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nathaniel Batchelder于大约1630年出生在英国米德萊可哈可尼时，他的父亲Nathaniel Batchiler42岁，母亲Hester Mercier11628岁。他于1656年12月10日与Deborah Smith在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾洛金哈姆咸頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他在美国新罕布什尔州洛金哈姆咸頓住了大约12年。他去世于1710年1月2日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾洛金哈姆咸頓享年81岁，埋葬在美国新罕布什尔州洛金哈姆咸頓。

nameMeanings.name: Batchelder
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Norfolk): altered form of Batchelor , showing the folk-etymology influence of the word elder, with which it is not in fact connected.

variants.name: Batchelor
meanings: English: status name for a young knight or novice at arms, Middle English and Old French bacheler (medieval Latin baccalarius). The word had already been extended to mean ‘(young) unmarried man’ by the 14th century, but it is unlikely that many bearers of the surname derive from the word in that sense.

History: The Reverend Stephen Bachiler (c. 1561–1656) was a Puritan nonconformist, born in Hampshire, England, who came to New England in 1632, at the age of 71. In 1638/9 he was the leader of the founders of Hampton, NH.

variants.name: Bachelder
meanings: Altered form of English   Batchelder  . Compare   Bacheller  .

nameMeanings.name: Nathaniel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of a New Testament name, which is derived from the Greek form of a Hebrew name meaning ‘God has given’ ( compare Nathan , which is sometimes taken as a short form of this name). It was borne by one of the less prominent of Christ's apostles (John 1:45; 21:2), who in fact is probably identical with Bartholomew . The spelling used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament is Nathanael , but this is in much less frequent use as a given name in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Massachusetts Colony Gains Control of New Hampshire
historicEvents.description: In 1641, Massachusetts gained control of New Hampshire until 1679 when New Hampshire became a separate royal colony.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: When Nathaniel Batchelder was born about 1630, in Hackney, Middlesex, England, his father, Nathaniel Batchiler, was 42 and his mother, Hester Mercier, was 11628. He married Deborah Smith on 10 December 1656, in Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. He lived in Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, United States for about 12 years. He died on 2 January 1710, in Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, at the age of 81, and was buried in Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nathaniel Batchelder est né environ 1630, à Hackney, Middlesex, Angleterre, son père, Nathaniel Batchiler, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Hester Mercier, avait 11628 ans. Il a épousé Deborah Smith le 10 décembre 1656, à Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Il a vécu à Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, États-Unis pendant environ 12 ans. Il est décédé le 2 janvier 1710, à Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 81 ans, et a été enterré à Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nathaniel Batchelder um 1630 in Hackney, Middlesex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nathaniel Batchiler 42 und seine Mutter Hester Mercier 11628. Er hat am 10. Dezember 1656 in Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America Deborah Smith geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er hat ungefähr 12 Jahre lang in Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. Er starb am 2. Januar 1710 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America und wurde in Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nathaniel Batchelder è nato il circa 1630 nel Hackney, Middlesex, England, il suo padre, Nathaniel Batchiler, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Hester Mercier, aveva 11628 anni. Lui sposato Deborah Smith il 10 dicembre 1656, nel Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Vissuto a Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Stati Uniti d'America per circa 12 anni. Morì il 2 gennaio 1710, nel Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, all'età di 81 anni, e fu sepolto a Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.Hampton, New Hampshire, British Colonial: イギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアハンプトン
ja.Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, USA: アメリカ合衆国ニューハンプシャー州ロクインガムハンプトン
ja.Hampton, Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colo: イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーノーフォルクハンプトン
ja.Southampton, Hampshire, England: イギリスハンプシュアイアソウサンプトン
ja.lifeSummary: Nathaniel Batchelderが約1630年にイギリスミッドレセックスハクニーで生まれた時，父Nathaniel Batchilerは42歳，母Hester Mercierは11628歳であった。1656年12月10日にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアロクインガムハンプトンでDeborah Smithと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼はアメリカ合衆国ニューハンプシャー州ロクインガムハンプトンに約12年間住んでいた。彼は1710年1月2日にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアロクインガムハンプトンで81歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国ニューハンプシャー州ロクインガムハンプトンにて埋葬された。

ko.Hampton, Rockingham Co., New Hampshire,: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 록잉함 함프턴
ko.Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Brit: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 록잉함 함프턴
ko.Hampton, New Hampshire, British Colonial: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 함프턴
ko.Hampton, Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colo: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 노르폴크 함프턴
ko.lifeSummary: Nathaniel Batchelder(이)가 대략 1630년 영국 미들레세스 해c니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nathaniel Batchiler(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Hester Mercier(은)는 11628세였다. 그는 1656년 12월 10일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 록잉함 함프턴에서 Deborah Smith(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 미국 뉴햄프셔 주 록잉함 함프턴에서 약 12년 동안 살았다. 그는 1710년 1월 2일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 록잉함 함프턴에서 81세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 뉴햄프셔 주 록잉함 함프턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nathaniel Batchelder nasceu aproximadamente 1630, em Hackney, Middlesex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Nathaniel Batchiler, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Hester Mercier, tinha 11628 anos. Ele casou-se com Deborah Smith em 10 de dezembro de 1656, em Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele viveu em Hampton, Rockingham, Nova Hampshire, Estados Unidos da América por quase 12 anos. Ele faleceu em 2 de janeiro de 1710, em Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, com 81 anos, e foi sepultado em Hampton, Rockingham, Nova Hampshire, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nathaniel Batchelder родился около 1630 г. в местности хаккни, миддлесекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Nathaniel Batchiler было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Hester Mercier, 11628. Он женился на женщине по имени Deborah Smith 10 декабря 1656 г. в местности хамптон, роккингхам, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Он жил в местности хамптон, роккингхам, Нью-Гэмпшир, Соединенные штаты около 12 лет. Он умер 2 января 1710 г. в местности хамптон, роккингхам, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 81 год и был похоронен в местности хамптон, роккингхам, Нью-Гэмпшир, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nathaniel Batchelder nació aproximadamente 1630, en Hackney, Middlesex, Inglaterra, su papá, Nathaniel Batchiler, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Hester Mercier, tenía 11628 años. Se casó con Deborah Smith el 10 de diciembre de 1656, en Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Vivió en Hampton, Rockingham, Nuevo Hampshire, Estados Unidos durante unos 12 años. Murió el 2 de enero de 1710, en Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, a la edad de 81 años, y fue sepultado en Hampton, Rockingham, Nuevo Hampshire, Estados Unidos.
